options.content:
# рҹҸӯ NEXUS 4.0 вҖ” Sistema Multi-Agente para GestГЈo de OperaГ§Гөes Industriais
**PPGEPS/Unisinos** вҖ” Sistemas AvanГ§ados em Engenharia de ProduГ§ГЈo e IA

6 Agentes de IA | RAG | WhatsApp | N8N | Docker

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(oee_pct) AS "OEE" FROM equipment WHERE status != 'offline'
SELECT COUNT(*) || '/' || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment) AS "Equip." FROM equipment WHERE health_score >= 75
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "CrГӯticos" FROM materials WHERE stock_current < stock_min
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "NCRs" FROM quality_records WHERE status NOT IN ('corrigida', 'fechada')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Exec." FROM automation_logs WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Alertas" FROM automation_logs WHERE status IN ('warning', 'critical') AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

options.content:
### NavegaГ§ГЈo RГЎpida

| Dashboard | DescriГ§ГЈo |
|-----------|----------|
| [рҹ“Ҳ VisГЈo Geral](/d/nexus-visao-geral) | OEE, ordens de produГ§ГЈo, health scores, decisГөes dos agentes |
| [рҹ”§ ManutenГ§ГЈo Preditiva](/d/nexus-manutencao) | Sensores IoT em tempo real, vibraГ§ГЈo, temperatura, previsГЈo de falha |
| [рҹ“Ұ Supply Chain & Estoque](/d/nexus-supply-chain) | NГӯveis de estoque, fornecedores, materiais crГӯticos |
| [рҹ“Ӣ GestГЈo de Materiais](/d/nexus-materiais) | ClassificaГ§ГЈo ABC/XYZ, cobertura, movimentaГ§Гөes, pedidos de compra |
| [рҹ”Қ Qualidade](/d/nexus-qualidade) | NCRs, defeitos por tipo/severidade, timeline |
| [рҹ’° Financeiro & Custos](/d/nexus-financeiro) | Valor em estoque, custos por produto, receita potencial |
| [вҡЎ AutomaГ§Гөes N8N](/d/nexus-automacoes) | ExecuГ§Гөes automГЎticas, alertas, agentes acionados |
| [рҹ”— Grafo de Conhecimento](/d/nexus-grafo) | RelaГ§Гөes: BOM, fornecedores, cadeia completa, rastreabilidade |

### Interfaces Externas

| ServiГ§o | URL |
|---------|-----|
| рҹ’¬ Chat com Agentes | [localhost:8501](http://localhost:8501) |
| рҹ”„ N8N Workflows | [localhost:5678](http://localhost:5678) |
| рҹ”— Neo4j Browser | [localhost:7474](http://localhost:7474) |
| рҹ”Ң API NEXUS | [localhost:8080](http://localhost:8080) |

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at AS "Hora", workflow_name AS "Workflow", status AS "Status", summary AS "Resumo", array_to_string(agents_involved, ', ') AS "Agentes" FROM automation_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 8
SELECT created_at AS "Hora", agent_role AS "Agente", decision AS "DecisГЈo", confidence AS "ConfianГ§a" FROM agent_decisions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 8
